Server: /C=ES/L=Madrid/O=AirTouch/OU=Server/CN=AirTouch CA/emailAddress=server@AirTouch.htb (hash=ef39f3ff). TLS completed but EAP auth failed with probe creds. Client uses PEAP+MSCHAPv2.

hypothesis: Relaunch evil twin on wlan1 with matching CA cert

hypothesis: Evil twin with matching CA subject fields bypasses client CA validation

why: Client validates CA by certificate hash/fingerprint (222a7dd4), not just subject. Self-signed cert with matching subject still rejected. Need actual CA private key to sign server cert.
